title: helinus scandens
intro: Helinus scandens is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It is commonly known as the Rock Rose, and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Helinus scandens include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing skin irritations, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
